summary.en: A grid-connected PV inverter must demonstrate protection behavior suitable for the Indonesian connection point, including anti-islanding, voltage and frequency trip settings, reconnection logic, and commissioning evidence requested by PLN or the relevant network operator. This is usually reviewed as part of the project grid-connection file rather than as a stand-alone import certificate.
summary.zh: 并网光伏逆变器必须证明其保护行为适合印度尼西亚接入点，包括防孤岛、电压和频率跳闸参数、重连逻辑，以及 PLN 或相关电网运营商要求的投运证据。这通常作为项目并网文件的一部分审查，而不是独立进口证书。
summary.zht: 併網光伏逆變器必須證明其保護行為適合印尼接入點，包括防孤島、電壓和頻率跳閘參數、重連邏輯，以及 PLN 或相關電網營運商要求的投運證據。這通常作為專案併網文件的一部分審查，而不是獨立進口證書。

standards_or_laws: PLN grid-connection and commissioning review for connected distributed generation
Inverter anti-islanding, voltage, frequency, and reconnection settings requested for the project
Project-specific protection coordination and commissioning evidence

summary.en: Chinese anti-islanding reports under GB/T 19964, GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, or utility procedures are useful engineering evidence, but the installed firmware and settings must be confirmed against Indonesian grid parameters and project approval conditions.
summary.zh: 依据 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 或电网公司流程形成的中国防孤岛报告是有用的工程证据，但已安装固件和参数必须按印度尼西亚电网参数及项目批准条件确认。
summary.zht: 依據 GB/T 19964、GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004 或電網公司流程形成的中國防孤島報告是有用的工程證據，但已安裝韌體和參數必須按印尼電網參數及專案批准條件確認。

gap.en: The gap is not only whether anti-islanding exists; it is whether the exact model, firmware version, protection table, and commissioning record match the Indonesian project. Lockable settings and Indonesian-language parameter sheets reduce approval friction.
gap.zh: 差距不只是是否具备防孤岛功能，而是具体型号、固件版本、保护参数表和投运记录是否匹配印度尼西亚项目。可锁定参数和印尼语参数表可降低审批摩擦。
gap.zht: 差距不只是是否具備防孤島功能，而是具體型號、韌體版本、保護參數表和投運記錄是否匹配印尼專案。可鎖定參數和印尼語參數表可降低審批摩擦。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the inverter operates in parallel with PLN or another Indonesian network; evidence is project-specific and may be required before energization
mandatory_status.cn: Not transferable — China anti-islanding reports support review but do not by themselves approve Indonesian operation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat anti-islanding as a PLN project-approval and commissioning evidence issue, not merely as a factory feature listed in the Chinese datasheet.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将防孤岛视为 PLN 项目批准和投运证据问题，而不只是中国数据表中的工厂功能。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將防孤島視為 PLN 專案批准和投運證據問題，而不只是中國資料表中的工廠功能。
